nodes.name: capture-acpx-skills-screenshots.mjs
nodes.summary: Playwright-based screenshot capture script that iterates over Storybook story IDs for the acpx-local adapter skills tab, rendering each in light and dark themes and saving PNGs to a configurable output directory.

nodes.name: capture-pap-2351-binding-picker.mjs
nodes.summary: Playwright screenshot script for PAP-2351 that spins up an inline static HTTP server, navigates Playwright Chromium to each binding-picker story URL, and captures PNGs — serving as a one-shot visual documentation helper for that ticket.

nodes.name: check-docker-deps-stage.mjs
nodes.summary: CI validation script that parses the Dockerfile's `deps` stage COPY instructions, resolves all pnpm workspace package.json paths, and asserts every workspace package is covered by a COPY glob — preventing missed packages in the Docker dependency layer.

nodes.name: check-forbidden-tokens.mjs
nodes.summary: CI security script that scans staged or repo files for forbidden tokens such as secrets, usernames, and custom token lists, exiting non-zero if any matches are found to prevent accidental credential leaks.

nodes.name: check-release-package-bootstrap.mjs
nodes.summary: CI release gating script that computes which npm packages need bootstrapping validation based on changed paths, queries npm registry for package existence, and ensures newly-enabled packages are registered before a release proceeds.

nodes.name: check-release-package-bootstrap.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the release-package bootstrap check logic, covering manifest-driven package detection, diff-based package filtering, npm failure classification, and fallback to public package state.

nodes.name: clean-onboard-git.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal shell helper that cleans up git-related artifacts from an onboarding test run, removing temporary git worktree directories and state left by the onboarding integration tests.

nodes.name: clean-onboard-npm.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal shell helper that removes npm cache and module artifacts accumulated during onboarding test runs, enabling clean-slate re-runs.

nodes.name: clean-onboard-ref.sh
nodes.summary: Integration test script that checks out a specified git ref into an isolated temporary worktree with a clean HOME, npm cache, and data directory, then runs `pnpm paperclipai onboard` against it to validate the full onboarding flow from scratch.

nodes.name: create-github-release.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that uses the `gh` CLI to create or update a GitHub Release for a given calendar-versioned tag, reading release notes from the `releases/` directory and resolving the remote automatically.

nodes.name: dev-runner-output.mjs
nodes.summary: Shared utility module providing `createCapturedOutputBuffer` (a rolling byte-limited buffer for child process stdout/stderr) and `parseJsonResponseWithLimit` (a streaming JSON response parser with a size cap), used by the dev runner to safely capture subprocess and HTTP output.

nodes.name: dev-runner-output.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript source counterpart to dev-runner-output.mjs, providing the same byte-limited output buffer and JSON response parser with explicit TypeScript types including the `CapturedOutput` interface.

nodes.name: dev-runner-paths.mjs
nodes.summary: Exports a single `shouldTrackDevServerPath` predicate that filters out test files, test config files, Node.js diagnostic reports, and `.paperclip/` internal paths from the dev runner's file-change watcher.

nodes.name: dev-runner.mjs
nodes.summary: Compiled/ESM dev runner entry point that watches multiple workspace directories for file changes and orchestrates hot-reloading of the Paperclip server process, managing graceful shutdown, Tailscale auth flags, and dev-server status token coordination.

nodes.name: dev-runner.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript source for the dev runner, extending the ESM version with worktree environment bootstrapping, local service registry integration for dev-service adoption and deduplication, and TypeScript-native imports from server internals.

nodes.name: dev-service-profile.ts
nodes.summary: Exports the repo root path constant and a `createDevServiceIdentity` helper that produces a deterministic service key and fingerprint for registering the dev runner in the local service supervisor registry.

nodes.name: dev-service.ts
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for listing and stopping active Paperclip dev services registered in the local service supervisor, supporting `list` and `stop` subcommands.

nodes.name: discord-daily-digest.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that reads the day's git commits from the master branch and posts a formatted Discord embed via webhook, summarizing merged commits with hash links and authors for daily team visibility.

nodes.name: docker-build-test.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that builds the Paperclip Docker image with test configuration and runs a basic smoke validation to ensure the container image builds and starts successfully.

nodes.name: docker-entrypoint.sh
nodes.summary: Docker container entrypoint script that sets up the runtime environment and delegates to the appropriate startup command, handling initialization steps before handing off to the Node.js process.

nodes.name: docker-onboard-smoke.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Docker-based onboarding smoke test that pulls or uses a local Paperclip image, starts a container with configurable deployment parameters, waits for HTTP readiness, optionally bootstraps an admin account, and verifies the full onboarding flow end-to-end.

nodes.name: ensure-plugin-build-deps.mjs
nodes.summary: Pre-build script that ensures `@paperclipai/shared` and `@paperclipai/plugin-sdk` dist outputs exist before plugin build starts, using a file-based lock to prevent concurrent TypeScript compilation races in pnpm workspaces.

nodes.name: ensure-workspace-package-links.ts
nodes.summary: Development tool that walks the monorepo workspace directories to discover all package.json files, then verifies each workspace package's node_modules symlinks resolve to the correct workspace source paths, reporting any mismatches.

nodes.name: generate-company-assets.ts
nodes.summary: Standalone CLI tool that reads agent company packages from a directory (each with a COMPANY.md frontmatter file), renders org chart PNGs via the server-side SVG renderer, and generates README files using the company export service — enabling offline asset generation without a browser.

nodes.name: generate-npm-package-json.mjs
nodes.summary: Build script that transforms the CLI's dev package.json (with workspace:* references) into a publishable npm package.json by inlining all external dependencies from bundled workspace packages and removing workspace-only dependencies.
